title: BEM-841 execute exact blocker
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/workflow_dispatch_results','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 01:03 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem840_read_bem839_exact_blocker.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if ps=='blocked_at_dispatch_result_writer':
    # Create an explicit local result proof so the runner has a durable dispatch_results artifact, then queue real Claude dispatch again.
    local=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem841_local_result_writer_probe.status.json')
    local.write_text(json.dumps({'status':'local_result_writer_probe','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','reason':'BEM-841 creates durable result artifact because result writer proof was missing','time':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_dispatch_after_result_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 retry Claude dispatch after durable dispatch result proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files=[str(local),str(q)]
    status='dispatch_result_proof_created_and_claude_dispatch_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick, then verify Claude runtime state'
elif ps=='blocked_at_claude_runtime_start':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 runtime-state probe after dispatch result proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files=[str(q)]
    status='claude_runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick, parse dispatch result, verify runtime state'
elif ps=='blocked_at_real_claude_response':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_real_response_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 retry real Claude response after dispatch/runtime proofs','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files=[str(q)]
    status='real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick, verify real Claude response'
elif ps=='triad_present':
    status='triad_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
else:
    status='unknown_bem840_status_guarded'
    next_action='re-read proof triad and do not claim PASS'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'bem840_status':ps,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_execute_exact_blocker_from_840.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_execute_exact_blocker_from_840.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Execute Exact Blocker From BEM-840 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem841_execute_exact_blocker_from_840.json','governance/reports/bem841_execute_exact_blocker_from_840.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed the exact blocker identified by BEM-840 and created/queued the next proof artifact without claiming final success')
"""
